content.en:
From the fourfold peak ancestor to the fivefold ancestor, a total of three conditions need to be met.

One of them is to temper the Will Pagoda nine times, and when you complete it, you can become a half-step five-fold ancestor.

The second condition is to refine the body of the original ancestor, and it also needs to be tempered to more than nine times.

"The body of the original ancestor can even be refined!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

His Primordial Ancestor Body was the Primordial Zhou Tian Body, the Primordial Ancestor Body formed by condensing the Primordial Zhou Heaven Diagram, which was extremely powerful, and he felt that his Primordial Ancestor Body had been raised to the limit and could not continue to improve.

Now I know that the body of the original ancestor can also be tempered again and again, and he has not been tempered once.

And if you want to refine the body of the original ancestor, you must have an extremely strong Extreme Dao will and the Extreme Extreme Dao cooperation.

Of course, the most important point is that the Natal Primordial Control Technique needs to be tempered together, and this process requires the Natal Extreme Dao Quenching Technique, which is also a very important inheritance, and ordinary forces do not have it at all.

If you have the Natal Extreme Dao Quenching Technique, it is not very difficult to refine the body of the original ancestor.

It can be said that these two conditions just take a long time and are not very difficult.

The real difficulty is the third condition, and it is also the reason why countless half-step fivefold primordial ancestors are trapped, and that is to absorb the primordial tribulation qi!

The Primordial Tribulation Qi was born in the Primordial Black Sea, and every few years, some were born, and randomly appeared somewhere in the Primordial Black Sea, but once they appeared, they would be snatched away by the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors.

As for ordinary Primordial Ancestors wanting to obtain the Primordial Tribulation Qi, the possibility is close to zero, unless it is really against the sky, when they are shuttling through the Primordial Black Sea, they encounter the Primordial Tribulation Qi that has just been born, and then after taking it, they immediately flee away from being discovered by the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors.

Other than that

There are other ways to obtain Primordial Tribulation Qi from any of the Fivefold Holy Gates, but they are all very small, and it will take a long time to accumulate some of them.

The Fivefold Primordial Ancestors of the Upper Spirit Primordial Realm controlled the Primordial Tribulation Qi, which was the reason why those Fourfold Heavenly Gates couldn't give birth to the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors, because they couldn't get a share of the Primordial Tribulation Qi at all.

Of course, even if you have the Primordial Tribulation Qi, you only have a very low probability of becoming a Fivefold Primordial Ancestor.

After all, the primordial tribulation qi only qualified the half-step fivefold ancestor to become a five-fold ancestor, but the success rate of each half-step fivefold ancestor was different!

If it fails, it's gone!

For example, those half-step fivefold ancestor branch elders of the Void Tooth Holy Gate have also obtained a primordial tribulation qi, but after the breakthrough fails, there will be no share, unless they have made a great contribution to the Void Tooth Holy Gate, they will have a chance to get a second share.

The success rate of the half-step fivefold primordial ancestor breaking through to the fivefold primordial ancestor is related to the number of extreme extremes comprehended, and it is also related to the natal primordial mastery technique.

Like the average Holy Son, the success rate is only one percent, and the success rate of comprehending one hundred and eight extreme paths, and having more than two kinds of natal primordial control skills, is only a little more than two percent.

Like Ye Tiancai, he has a fifty percent success rate.

Therefore, even if you have gathered a primordial calamity, you have to prepare a treasure similar to the primordial gold bead to increase the success rate.

If you have 10,000 Primordial Gold Beads and one more Primordial Tribulation, then you can become a Fivefold Primordial Ancestor 100%!

However, how difficult it is to gather 10,000 primordial gold beads!

However, if you get together a copy of the Primordial Tribulation Qi, there is still hope, after all, if you join the Fivefold Holy Gate and become a half-step Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, you can get a copy of the Primordial Tribulation Qi for free.

Under normal circumstances, if there is no primordial calamity, a half-step fivefold ancestor can also hope to impact the realm of the fivefold primordial ancestor, but the success rate may be one in a billion, and every time it fails, the success rate will get lower and lower until the opportunity is permanently lost.

And if there is a primordial calamity, the success rate of ordinary holy sons may be increased to a success rate of one percent.

Of course, if the physical body is not strong, if the will is not strong, the refining of the primordial tribulation qi will not only fail, but may also be killed, which is why it is required to refine the will pagoda and the body of the original ancestor to the top nine times.

In short, the more tempering times, the weaker the success rate, and even if it fails, it will not be killed.

"Quenching the Will Pagoda more than nine times, refining the body of the Origin Ancestor more than nine times, plus a primordial calamity, these are the three conditions. If you want to increase the success rate, you have to prepare a large number of primordial gold beads, otherwise it depends on luck!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

And many half-step fivefold ancestors of the Void Tooth Holy Gate did not have the primordial gold beads, and only obtained a primordial calamity, so they relied on luck to impact the fivefold primordial ancestor, but failed, and until today they have not become a fivefold primordial ancestor.

Of course, there may be some half-step fivefold ancestors who still have the primordial calamity to this day, waiting for the opportunity to increase the success rate, and then go to the realm of the fivefold primordial ancestors!

"Fortunately, I joined the Void Tooth Holy Gate, otherwise, if I was to cultivate by myself, even if I obtained the inheritance in this area, it would be difficult to break through to the Fifth Origin Ancestor without the Primordial Tribulation!" Ye Tian secretly sighed.

Now.

He didn't need to worry about the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, after all, he had so many Primordial Gold Beads, he could become a Fivefold Primordial Ancestor 100%, he only needed to continuously refine the Will Pagoda and the Primordial Ancestor's body, and strive to temper it to the true limit.

And this process must require a lot of resources, and he himself has accumulated countless resources, and the Void Fang Holy Gate has also promised to provide resources for him to cultivate, so he doesn't need to worry about resources.

"The Will Pagoda and the Ancestral Body can be tempered at the same time, but it is generally the Will Pagoda that is tempered first, and when the Will Pagoda is tempered to a certain extent, and then the Ancestral Body is tempered, the speed will be many times faster!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Because if you refine the Will Pagoda, the Extreme Dao Will will become stronger and stronger, and the Extreme Dao Will can only be tempered by combining the Extreme Extreme Dao and the Natal Primordial Control Technique.

Therefore, the stronger the will of the Extreme Dao, the better the refining effect will naturally be.

Ye Tian naturally had to refine the Will Pagoda first, and when the refining process was completed, it would naturally be much easier to refine the body of the original ancestor.

"Let's start refining!"

Ye Tian used the Extreme Dao Refining Technique to cooperate with his three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extreme Dao to begin refining the Will Pagoda.

Airplanes!!!

Under a special fluctuation, Ye Tian's Will Pagoda began to be refined, and this process required a variety of resources to enhance the will of the Extreme Dao to cooperate with the tempering, so that the will of the Extreme Dao could be improved.

Temper!

Temper!

Temper!

Ye Tian frantically tempered the Will Pagoda, and he didn't care about the consumption of resources at all.

And the Void Tooth Heavenly Gate also has some treasure land, which is suitable for refining the Will Pagoda, and has a certain auxiliary effect, so Ye Tian also went to those treasure lands and accelerated the refining speed.

More than 10,000 Origin Domain Epochs had passed, and Ye Tiancai had successfully completed a tempering.

"Huh, using the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, it took so long to refine and complete, it's too difficult!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
